purpose: Public-safe schema for finite generated claim-contract events and passport rows.

fields.name: event_id
fields.description: Stable identifier for a generated claim-contract event.

fields.name: dataset_id
fields.description: Dataset or adapter identifier from dataset_source_manifest_20260520.csv.

fields.name: scenario_id
fields.description: Scenario identifier from split_scenario_manifest_examples_20260520.csv or a release successor.

fields.name: model_or_scorer
fields.description: Model, scorer, or adapter source for the evidence row.

fields.name: seed_or_profile
fields.description: Random seed, run id, alert profile, or declared profile context.

fields.name: claim_layer
fields.description: Typed layer of the tempting claim.

fields.name: G_information_boundary
fields.description: Comparison and information boundary such as same-regime or upper-bound-only.

fields.name: Q_reportability_policy
fields.description: Declared reportability policy or support state.

fields.name: preorder_relation
fields.description: Typed preorder relation or declared incomparability class.

fields.name: tempting_sentence
fields.description: Claim sentence that a metric-only reading might emit.

fields.name: licensed_sentence
fields.description: Projected claim after applying the claim-contract operator, or bottom_T.

fields.name: forbidden_sentence
fields.description: Representative overclaim blocked by the contract.

fields.name: source_anchor_id
fields.description: Public-safe source identifier, not a private local path.
